'''''Kedriss One''''' was an [[Evac ship/Legends|evacuation ship]] used by several [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in an attempt to flee [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] before its destruction. The ship was destroyed by [[Mandalorian Crusaders]] on [[Basilisk war droid/Legends|Basilisk war droids]] before it could leave the system.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 5]] {{1st}} {{1stID|''Kedriss One''}}
